description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with wide overhangs and a central recessed entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray tone, complemented by large rectangular windows on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. A spacious wraparound porch with a wooden railing extends across the rear and partially along the sides, providing outdoor living space. The structure is single-story, with a symmetrical layout and a prominent central roof peak. The front facade is defined by two projecting wings flanking the main entrance, each with its own set of windows. The overall design is simple yet functional, emphasizing horizontal lines and a strong connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, large windows, and a wraparound porch, featuring a symmetrical front and muted gray exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central recessed entrance, two projecting wings, and large front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended hip roof and the wraparound porch with wooden railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the wraparound porch and multiple rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch extension and a mix of window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
